tool.name: waf_bypass_toolkit
tool.description: WAF Bypass Toolkit for evading Web Application Firewall detection.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Encode payloads with various methods (URL, HTML, Base64, Hex, Unicode) - Generate multiple payload variants - Generate case variations - Inject comments to evade detection - Generate Unicode-based bypasses

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The bypass technique: - encode_payload: Encode payload with various methods - generate_variants: Generate multiple payload variants - case_manipulation: Generate case variations - comment_injection: Inject comments to evade detection - unicode_bypass: Generate Unicode-based bypasses

parameter.name: payload
parameter.description: Original payload to transform. Required for most actions.

parameter.name: encoding_type
parameter.description: Specific encoding: url, double_url, hex, base64

returns.description: Transformed payloads for WAF bypass testing

tool.examples:
# Encode payload
encode_payload <script>alert(1)</script>
# Generate variants
generate_variants ' OR '1'='1
# Case manipulation
case_manipulation SELECT * FROM users
# Comment injection
comment_injection SELECT * FROM users
